content.problemStatement:
Chef loves playing with strings. He has two strings `S` and `P`. Chef wants to insert string `P` into `S` at a given position `pos` (1 based indexing).

Your task is to help Chef create the new string after the insertion.


Input Format

The first line of input contains an integer `T`, the number of test cases.
The first line of each test case contains two space separated strings, `S` and `P`.
The second line contains an integer `pos`, denoting the position where string `P` is to be inserted.


Output Format
For each test case, print the new string after inserting `P` into `S` at position `pos`.
